title: Homelife Typhoon 2200w Steam Iron/Non-stick Soleplate/Steam or Dry Iron/Water Spray/Adjustable Temperature/Self Clean Anti-drip and Anti-calc / 2m long cord / E7705
features: STEAM, WATER SPRAY AND DRY IRON: With steam, shot of steam, water spray and dry iron functions, this 2200w iron is designed to help remove even the most stubborn creases. With a large 300ml water tank, steam rate of 40g per minute and shot of steam rate at 140g per minute creases don't stand a chance!

VARIABLE THERMOSTAT CONTROL DIAL: Adjusting the dial allows you to set the ideal temperature setting depending on the types of fabrics being ironed. Using the dial, choose from the cotton, linen silk and wool settings or set your own temperature. The red pilot lamp will turn off to indicate the correct temperature has been reached. Get the perfect finish every time.

SELF CLEAN, ANTI-DRIP AND ANTI-CALC: 3 functions designed to make your life easier and maintain the performance of your iron. The self clean button blows air though the steam vents to blow out any mineral deposits preventing these being ejected onto your clothing. Built into the iron, anti-calc reduces the amount of calcium depositions from hard water accumulating inside the iron/steam vents and anti-drip prevents the continuous dripping of water on garments when ironing
STAINLESS STEEL SOLEPLATE: The stainless steel soleplate glides easily over fabrics and doesn't stick, so there's no worry about damaging garments.
STYLISH, ERGONOMIC DESIGN: The comfortable ergonomic handle allows for greater stability and the heel rest allows you to stand the iron vertically to set aside safely.
description: From the manufacturer 140g/min Steam Burst Iron – 300ml Tank, Vertical Steam & Spray, Non-Drip Deliver powerful results with a 140g/min steam shot, ideal for stubborn creases. Features vertical steam, spray function, and a non-drip design for mess-free ironing. The 300ml water tank, self-cleaning, and anti-calc system ensure lasting performance and easy maintenance. 2200W Steam Iron – Stainless Steel Soleplate, 2m Swivel Cord Enjoy smooth, crease-free ironing with an easy-glide stainless steel soleplate and powerful 2200W output for efficient performance. Designed with simple controls and an extra-long 2m tangle-free swivel cord for maximum comfort and flexibility. A Trusted Brand Offering a Wide Range of Quality Household Products. From steam irons to vacuum cleaners to torches and outdoor gear, each item is made to be user-friendly, ergonomic and help you get daily tasks done quickly and easily.
